item.title: Avogadro 2 [3D Graphics]
item.itunes:title: Avogadro 2 [3D Graphics]
item.itunes:author: hb882
item.itunes:summary:
Avogadro 2
(3D Graphics)
Avogadro libraries provide 3D rendering, visualization, analysis and data processing useful in computational chemistry, molecular modeling, bioinformatics, materials science, and related areas.
NOTE: This is only to provide appimages, I am not the developer.
[read more]
item.description:
Avogadro 2
(3D Graphics)
Avogadro libraries provide 3D rendering, visualization, analysis and data processing useful in computational chemistry, molecular modeling, bioinformatics, materials science, and related areas.
NOTE: This is only to provide appimages, I am not the developer.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Avogadro 2
(3D Graphics)
Avogadro libraries provide 3D rendering, visualization, analysis and data processing useful in computational chemistry, molecular modeling, bioinformatics, materials science, and related areas.
NOTE: This is only to provide appimages, I am not the developer.
[read more]

item.title: Divoratech [Developers Apps]
item.itunes:title: Divoratech [Developers Apps]
item.itunes:author: bimex
item.itunes:summary:
Divoratech
(Developers Apps)
"💰 Unlock AI Excellence Without Breaking the Bank! 🚀
Introducing Divora – Your Affordable AI Solution! 🤖
🌟 Don't break the bank for AI! Divora is here for you, empowering everyone, from small businesses to passionate enthusiasts, without costing a fortune! 💸
👩‍💼 Small business owner? 🙋‍♂️ AI enthusiast? Divora welcomes you all with open arms! 🎉
🎩 Say goodbye to costly development! No need to spend millions. Divora's budget-friendly approach makes AI accessible to all! 💰🚀
🔍 No more digging through endless open-source articles or colabs that don't work! Just upload your data, and Divora takes care of the rest. It's AI made easy! 🪄
🧠 For the true AI pioneers, Divora offers complete control over AI training. Build from scratch without breaking the bank! 💡
💡 And here's the game-changer: After training, Divora lets you export the simple code. Your AI, your code, your rules! 📦🛠️
Ready to embrace AI without the high costs and frustrations? Join the AI revolution with Divora! 🌐Your affordable AI adventure begins right here, as of now, anyone including you can build your very one AI🚀✨"

[read more]
item.description:
Divoratech
(Developers Apps)
"💰 Unlock AI Excellence Without Breaking the Bank! 🚀
Introducing Divora – Your Affordable AI Solution! 🤖
🌟 Don't break the bank for AI! Divora is here for you, empowering everyone, from small businesses to passionate enthusiasts, without costing a fortune! 💸
👩‍💼 Small business owner? 🙋‍♂️ AI enthusiast? Divora welcomes you all with open arms! 🎉
🎩 Say goodbye to costly development! No need to spend millions. Divora's budget-friendly approach makes AI accessible to all! 💰🚀
🔍 No more digging through endless open-source articles or colabs that don't work! Just upload your data, and Divora takes care of the rest. It's AI made easy! 🪄
🧠 For the true AI pioneers, Divora offers complete control over AI training. Build from scratch without breaking the bank! 💡
💡 And here's the game-changer: After training, Divora lets you export the simple code. Your AI, your code, your rules! 📦🛠️
Ready to embrace AI without the high costs and frustrations? Join the AI revolution with Divora! 🌐Your affordable AI adventure begins right here, as of now, anyone including you can build your very one AI🚀✨"

[read more]

"💰 Unlock AI Excellence Without Breaking the Bank! 🚀
Introducing Divora – Your Affordable AI Solution! 🤖
🌟 Don't break the bank for AI! Divora is here for you, empowering everyone, from small businesses to passionate enthusiasts, without costing a fortune! 💸
👩‍💼 Small business owner? 🙋‍♂️ AI enthusiast? Divora welcomes you all with open arms! 🎉
🎩 Say goodbye to costly development! No need to spend millions. Divora's budget-friendly approach makes AI accessible to all! 💰🚀
🔍 No more digging through endless open-source articles or colabs that don't work! Just upload your data, and Divora takes care of the rest. It's AI made easy! 🪄
🧠 For the true AI pioneers, Divora offers complete control over AI training. Build from scratch without breaking the bank! 💡
💡 And here's the game-changer: After training, Divora lets you export the simple code. Your AI, your code, your rules! 📦🛠️
Ready to embrace AI without the high costs and frustrations? Join the AI revolution with Divora! 🌐Your affordable AI adventure begins right here, as of now, anyone including you can build your very one AI🚀✨"

For 32-bit and for 64-bit.

item.title: streamCapture2 [TV & Streaming]
item.itunes:title: streamCapture2 [TV & Streaming]
item.itunes:author: posktomten
item.itunes:summary:
streamCapture2
(TV & Streaming)
A program to save streaming video to your computer. A graphical shell for the command line program svtplay-dl
The program works with Linux, Windows and MacOS X. The program is written in C++ and uses Qt5 graphic library.

streamCapture2 is available in three languages: English, Italian and Swedish

The AppImage updates itself, you only need to download once.

https://gitlab.com/posktomten/streamcapture2/-/wikis/home

https://youtu.be/S7343rgpQNI2/-/wikis/home

Manual English
https://bin.ceicer.com/streamcapture2/help-current/index_en_US.html
Manual Italian
https://bin.ceicer.com/streamcapture2/help-current/index_it_IT.html
Manual Svensk
https://bin.ceicer.com/streamcapture2/help-current/index_sv_SE.html

Video
https://youtu.be/S7343rgpQNI
https://youtu.be/y3QgToXvzOE
https://youtu.be/1O9CW81LOIE
[read more]
item.description:
streamCapture2
(TV & Streaming)
A program to save streaming video to your computer. A graphical shell for the command line program svtplay-dl
The program works with Linux, Windows and MacOS X. The program is written in C++ and uses Qt5 graphic library.

streamCapture2 is available in three languages: English, Italian and Swedish

The AppImage updates itself, you only need to download once.

A program to save streaming video to your computer. A graphical shell for the command line program svtplay-dl
The program works with Linux, Windows and MacOS X. The program is written in C++ and uses Qt5 graphic library.

item.itunes:author: revwhiteshadow
item.itunes:summary:
FIX AIM BOOST NO ROOT FAB
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
[color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color]
[h2][color=#FF0000] FABNR [/color]- [color=#008000]FIX AIM BOOST NO ROOT [/color][/h2]
[color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color]
[h3] [b] MORE NON ROOTED TWEAKS [/b] [/h3]
[url=https://www.pling.com/p/2056054/]1.GODSPEED MODE NO ROOT [/url]
[b] THIS APP HAS MORE THAN 30 OPTIONS TO BOOST ANDROID WITHOUT ROOT[/b]
[url=https://www.pling.com/p/2058739/]2.NRFO [/url]
[b] NO TOOT FULL OPTIMIZATION [/b]
[url=https://www.pling.com/p/2065508/]3.WISP NO ROOT ENHANCER [/url]
[b] IT WILL ALSO OPTIMIZE YOUR DEVICE [/b]
[color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color]
[h3] [b]SUPPORT[/b] [/h3]
[url=https://godtspeed.xyz]Click here to visit GoDTspeed[/url]

[url=https://t.me/godTspeed]Join Official Channel[/url]

[url=https://t.me/godTspeed]Official Group to Share Your Problem[/url]

[color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color]
[h3][b] FIND MORE PROJECT FROM ☞ [/h3] [/b] [url=https://www.pling.com/u/revwhiteshadow] @revWhiteShadow [/url]
[color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color]
[h3][b]About.[/b][/h3]

GODSPEED FIX AIM BOOST, developed by revWhiteShadow, is a revolutionary module designed to enhance the aiming capabilities of players in online multiplayer games. The main feature of this module is its ability to fix aim assets, ensuring precise and accurate aiming in various gaming scenarios.

One of the common challenges in online multiplayer games is the inconsistency of aim, often caused by factors like latency and input delay. However, with GODSPEED FIX AIM BOOST, these issues are effectively addressed. The module incorporates advanced algorithms and techniques to minimize gyrodelay, resulting in a significantly improved aiming experience.

By utilizing GODSPEED FIX AIM BOOST, players can expect a noticeable reduction in aim drift and smoother tracking of targets. The module intelligently compensates for any discrepancies caused by system lag or controller input delay, allowing players to maintain consistent and reliable aim throughout their gameplay.

Whether engaging in intense first-person shooters or competitive multiplayer battles, GODSPEED FIX AIM BOOST provides players with a powerful tool to elevate their aiming skills and gain a competitive edge. With its innovative technology, this module aims to enhance the overall gaming experience, ensuring precise and accurate aim for players in online multiplayer environments.

[h3][b]About.[/b][/h3]

GODSPEED FIX AIM BOOST, developed by revWhiteShadow, is a revolutionary module designed to enhance the aiming capabilities of players in online multiplayer games. The main feature of this module is its ability to fix aim assets, ensuring precise and accurate aiming in various gaming scenarios.

One of the common challenges in online multiplayer games is the inconsistency of aim, often caused by factors like latency and input delay. However, with GODSPEED FIX AIM BOOST, these issues are effectively addressed. The module incorporates advanced algorithms and techniques to minimize gyrodelay, resulting in a significantly improved aiming experience.

By utilizing GODSPEED FIX AIM BOOST, players can expect a noticeable reduction in aim drift and smoother tracking of targets. The module intelligently compensates for any discrepancies caused by system lag or controller input delay, allowing players to maintain consistent and reliable aim throughout their gameplay.

Whether engaging in intense first-person shooters or competitive multiplayer battles, GODSPEED FIX AIM BOOST provides players with a powerful tool to elevate their aiming skills and gain a competitive edge. With its innovative technology, this module aims to enhance the overall gaming experience, ensuring precise and accurate aim for players in online multiplayer environments.

[h3][b]About.[/b][/h3]

GODSPEED FIX AIM BOOST, developed by revWhiteShadow, is a revolutionary module designed to enhance the aiming capabilities of players in online multiplayer games. The main feature of this module is its ability to fix aim assets, ensuring precise and accurate aiming in various gaming scenarios.

One of the common challenges in online multiplayer games is the inconsistency of aim, often caused by factors like latency and input delay. However, with GODSPEED FIX AIM BOOST, these issues are effectively addressed. The module incorporates advanced algorithms and techniques to minimize gyrodelay, resulting in a significantly improved aiming experience.

By utilizing GODSPEED FIX AIM BOOST, players can expect a noticeable reduction in aim drift and smoother tracking of targets. The module intelligently compensates for any discrepancies caused by system lag or controller input delay, allowing players to maintain consistent and reliable aim throughout their gameplay.

Whether engaging in intense first-person shooters or competitive multiplayer battles, GODSPEED FIX AIM BOOST provides players with a powerful tool to elevate their aiming skills and gain a competitive edge. With its innovative technology, this module aims to enhance the overall gaming experience, ensuring precise and accurate aim for players in online multiplayer environments.
